description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display and a thin, dark bezel framing the screen. The front of the monitor shows a display filled with colorful static, suggesting it is powered on but not receiving a signal. The monitor is supported by a sturdy, rectangular stand with a broad, flat base and a vertical support column attached to the back of the screen. The rear of the monitor is smooth and unadorned, with no visible buttons, ports, or branding. The overall design is modern and minimalist, with a matte black finish and clean lines. The monitor appears to be constructed primarily from plastic, with possible internal metal components for structural support.
description: A modern, flat-panel computer monitor with a black matte finish, thin bezel, and a rectangular stand. The screen displays colorful static, and the design is sleek and minimalist.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, flat display with colorful static and a thin, dark bezel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile and the vertical support column attached to a flat base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a smooth, unmarked back panel and the full width of the stand's base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the thinness of the screen and the depth of the base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, flat, and matte black, with sharp corners and no visible decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: Rectangular flat base with a vertical support column, both in matte black plastic, providing stable support without visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
